name: doctorsofficeapp
description: Doctors Office — Clinic Management Platform for Indian Doctors

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:yjs"
scripts.dev:nodb: concurrently "npm run dev:server:nodb" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:yjs"
scripts.dev:server:nodb: cd server && cross-env USE_MEMORY_DB=true npm run dev
scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && npm run build
scripts.install:all: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ../yjs-server && npm install
